name: kotlin-lsp
description: Real-time Kotlin code intelligence for Claude — instant diagnostics, go-to-definition, find references, and type info via kotlin-language-server.

pillars.supervised: Fully autonomous — read-only code analysis, no external calls or side effects
pillars.orchestrated: LSP protocol handles diagnostics, navigation, and hover automatically on file changes
pillars.secured: No credentials, no network access, no file writes — pure code analysis via local binary
